name: Sensitive File Accessed or Downloaded From Regions or Countries with Restricted Access
notes: This rule triggers when a confidential file is accessed or downloaded from a region or country with restricted access. These regions are defined in the BB:CategoryDefinition: Countries/Regions with Restricted Access building block.
conditions_text: when the event context is Remote to Local, Remote to Remote
when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Object Access Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Object Download Events
when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Countries/Regions with Restricted Access
when an event matches any of the following BB:Exfiltration: Files in Sensitive Directories
TD_list: APPLY Sensitive File Accessed or Downloaded From Regions or Countries with Restricted Access on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event context is Remote to Local, Remote to Remote
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Object Access Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Object Download Events
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Countries/Regions with Restricted Access
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:Exfiltration: Files in Sensitive Directories
RED_list: Event name: Sensitive File Accessed or Downloaded From a Restricted Region or Country
Event description: Sensitive file access or download from regions or countries with restricted access
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
